/usr/bin/ar qc librtcmbridge_core.a CMakeFiles/rtcmbridge_core.dir/src/core/mountpoint_config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtcmbridge_core.dir/src/core/ntrip_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtcmbridge_core.dir/src/core/rtcm_frame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtcmbridge_core.dir/src/core/rtcm_1005.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib librtcmbridge_core.a
